query: What vector store does this RAG engine use?
answer:
# Ollama and HuggingFace RAG Engine

This repository contains a chatbot implementation leveraging large language models (LLMs) for retrieval-augmented question answering (QA). = load_txts_from_directory(txt_directory)

# Chunk the documents
    chunks = chunk_documents(texts)

# Create embeddings and vector store
    embeddings = OllamaEmbeddings(model='nomic-embed-text', base_url="http://localhost:11434")
    embedding_dimensions = len(embeddings.embed_query("test query"))  # Determine embedding dimensions
    vector_store = create_vector_store(embedding_function=embeddings, dimensions=embedding_dimensions)

# Convert chunks into Document objects and add to vector store
    documents = [Document(page_content=chunk) for chunk in chunks]
    document_ids = vector_store.add_documents(documents=documents)
